form.label: 📃 Audit logs
form.description: This dashboard is used to monitor audit logs from scripts

search.query: index=_internal source="*TA-thehive-cortex_*.log" | rex field=_raw "exec_id=(?<exec_id>[^ \-]+)" | stats count by exec_id

panel.title: Audit logs : Modular input regarding TheHive Cortex API (Inputs)

search.query: index=_internal source="*TA-thehive-cortex_*.log" NOT (source="*search*" OR source="*get*" OR source="*run*") | stats count by source | rex field=source "TA-thehive-cortex_(?<input_name>[^.]+)\.log" | eval input_label = case( input_name=="thehive_alerts_cases", "TheHive: Alerts & Cases", input_name=="thehive_audit", "TheHive: Audit Logs", input_name=="thehive_observables", "TheHive: Observables", input_name=="thehive_timeline", "TheHive: Timeline", input_name=="thehive_tasks", "TheHive: Tasks", input_name=="thehive_instance_status", "TheHive: Instance Status", input_name=="backfill_alerts_cases", "TheHive: Alerts & Cases (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_audit", "TheHive: Audit Logs (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_observables", "TheHive: Observables (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_timeline", "TheHive: Timeline (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_tasks", "TheHive: Tasks (Backfill)", 1=1, input_name ) | table input_label source

index=_internal source="*TA-thehive-cortex_*.log" NOT (source="*search*" OR source="*get*" OR source="*run*") | search source=$input_source|s$ | rex field=source "TA-thehive-cortex_(?<input_name>[^.]+)\.log" | eval input_type = case( input_name=="thehive_alerts_cases", "TheHive: Alerts & Cases", input_name=="thehive_audit", "TheHive: Audit Logs", input_name=="thehive_observables", "TheHive: Observables", input_name=="thehive_timeline", "TheHive: Timeline", input_name=="thehive_tasks", "TheHive: Tasks", input_name=="thehive_instance_status", "TheHive: Instance Status", input_name=="backfill_alerts_cases", "TheHive: Alerts & Cases (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_audit", "TheHive: Audit Logs (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_observables", "TheHive: Observables (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_timeline", "TheHive: Timeline (Backfill)", input_name=="backfill_tasks", "TheHive: Tasks (Backfill)", 1=1, input_name ) | rex field=_raw "^\d+\-\d+\-\d+ \d+:\d+:\d+,\d+ (?<level_extract>[^\s]+)\s+(?<location_extract>[^\-]+) \- (?<signature_extract>.*)" | rex field=signature_extract "exec_id=(?<exec_id_extract>[^ \-]+)" | eval level = coalesce(level_extract, level), exec_id = coalesce(exec_id_extract, "N/A"), signature = coalesce(signature_extract, _raw) | search exec_id=$exec_id$ | sort 0 -_time -signature | table _time host input_type exec_id level signature | rename host as "Host", input_type as "Input Type", exec_id as "Execution UID", level as Level, signature as "Signature"

panel.title: Audit logs : Modular alerts regarding TheHive Cortex API (Custom Alert Action)

search.query: (index=_* OR index=cim_*) sourcetype="modular_alerts:thehive_*" OR sourcetype="modular_alerts:cortex_*" | stats count by sourcetype | eval label = case( sourcetype=="modular_alerts:thehive_create_a_new_alert", "TheHive: Create Alert", sourcetype=="modular_alerts:thehive_create_a_new_case", "TheHive: Create Case", sourcetype=="modular_alerts:thehive_add_timeline_event", "TheHive: Add Timeline Event", sourcetype=="modular_alerts:thehive_add_observables", "TheHive: Add Observable(s)", sourcetype=="modular_alerts:thehive_run_function", "TheHive: Run Function", sourcetype=="modular_alerts:cortex_run_a_new_job", "Cortex: Run Job", 1=1, sourcetype )

(index=_* OR index=cim_*) sourcetype="modular_alerts:thehive_*" OR sourcetype="modular_alerts:cortex_*" | search sourcetype="$action_filter$" | rex field=_raw "(?:log_level=)(?<type_extract>[^\s]+)" | rex field=_raw "(?:exec_id=)(?<exec_id_extract>[a-f0-9]{8})(?:\s+|$)" | rex field=_raw "\| (?<signature_extract>.*)" | eval type_val = coalesce(type_extract, log_level, type) | eval type = case(type_val=="10" OR type_val=="DEBUG", "DEBUG", type_val=="20" OR type_val=="INFO", "INFO", type_val=="30" OR type_val=="WARNING", "WARNING", type_val=="40" OR type_val=="ERROR", "ERROR", 1=1, type_val) | eval exec_id = coalesce(exec_id_extract, "N/A"), signature = coalesce(signature_extract, _raw) | search exec_id=$exec_id$ | table _time, sourcetype, exec_id, type, signature | sort 0 -_time | rename sourcetype as "Action", exec_id as "Execution ID", type as "Level", signature as "Message"

panel.title: Audit logs : Custom commands regarding TheHive Cortex API

search.query: index=_internal source="*TA-thehive-cortex_*.log" (source="*search*" OR source="*get*" OR source="*run*") | stats count by source | rex field=source "TA-thehive-cortex_(?<source_name>[^.]+)\.log" | table source_name source

index=_internal source="*TA-thehive-cortex_*.log" (source="*search*" OR source="*get*" OR source="*run*") | search source=$command_source|s$ | rex field=source "TA-thehive-cortex_(?<source_name>[^.]+)\.log" | rex field=_raw "^\d+\-\d+\-\d+ \d+:\d+:\d+,\d+ (?<type_extract>[^\s]+)\s+(?<location_extract>[^\-]+) \- (?<signature_extract>.*)" | rex field=signature_extract "exec_id=(?<exec_id_extract>[^ \-]+)" | eval type = coalesce(type_extract, type), exec_id = coalesce(exec_id_extract, "N/A"), signature = if(isnotnull(location_extract), location_extract . " - " . coalesce(signature_extract, _raw), coalesce(signature_extract, _raw)), source = source_name | search exec_id=$exec_id$ | table _time, source, exec_id, type, signature | sort 0 -_time | rename source as "Source", exec_id as "Execution ID", type as "Type", signature as "Message"

panel.title: Number of alerts and detected issues

search.query: (index=_* OR index=cim_*) sourcetype="modular_alerts:thehive_*" OR sourcetype="modular_alerts:cortex_*" | search sourcetype="$action_filter$" | rex field=_raw "(?:log_level=)(?<type_extract>[^\s]+)" | rex field=_raw "(?:exec_id=)(?<exec_id_extract>[a-f0-9]{8})(?:\s+|$)" | rex field=_raw "\| (?<signature_extract>.*)" | eval type_val = coalesce(type_extract, log_level, type) | eval type = case(type_val=="10" OR type_val=="DEBUG", "DEBUG", type_val=="20" OR type_val=="INFO", "INFO", type_val=="30" OR type_val=="WARNING", "WARNING", type_val=="40" OR type_val=="ERROR", "ERROR", 1=1, type_val) | eval exec_id = coalesce(exec_id_extract, "N/A"), signature = coalesce(signature_extract, _raw) | search exec_id=$exec_id$ | search type=ERROR OR signature="[CAA-THCA-125]*" OR signature="[THAO-50]*" OR signature="*TH201*" | eval information = if(like(signature,"%CAA-THCA-125%") OR like(signature,"%THAO-50%") OR like(signature,"%TH201%"),"Alert/Observable/Event was created","An issue was found") | timechart count by information

panel.title: Event codes used by the TheHive Cortex application found in the logs

chart.title: "DEBUG" mode enabled will let you see the all list of event codes generated if you encounter any trouble

search.query: (index=_* OR index=cim_*) sourcetype="modular_alerts:thehive_*" OR sourcetype="modular_alerts:cortex_*" | search sourcetype="$action_filter$" | rex field=_raw "(?:exec_id=)(?<exec_id_extract>[a-f0-9]{8})(?:\s+|$)" | eval exec_id = coalesce(exec_id_extract, "N/A") | search exec_id=$exec_id$ | rex field=_raw "\[(?<event_code>CAA-[^\]]+)\]" | where isnotnull(event_code) | timechart limit=20 count by event_code
